title: Cloud Abuse Hunt
description: Opinionated cloud-abuse hunt pack for suspicious principal use, policy changes, and resource tampering across cloud control planes.
hypothesis_templates: A compromised or misused cloud principal is modifying identity, policy, or resource state outside expected operational patterns.
Cross-account or cross-project control-plane activity indicates unauthorized cloud abuse rather than routine administration.

telemetry_requirements.description: Audit logs for role assignments, IAM policy changes, token generation, and service-account use.

blind_spots: Cloud services without centralized audit logging or short-lived ephemeral workload context will limit attribution quality.

execution_targets.name: AWS CloudTrail principal abuse sweep
execution_targets.description: Review CloudTrail for unusual principal activity, policy changes, or sensitive API usage.

execution_targets.name: GCP audit log privilege and resource sweep
execution_targets.description: Review GCP audit activity for suspicious service-account, IAM, or resource actions.

execution_targets.name: Splunk cloud control-plane correlation
execution_targets.description: Correlate cloud audit activity into one operational timeline.
